holdings.infoBox: DFLV is an equity ETF with a total of 337 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 4.82%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.61%, Exxon Mobil at 3.40%, Amazon.com at 2.98%, and Johnson & Johnson at 2.28%.

overview.description: The Dimensional US Large Cap Value ETF (DFLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to hold a broad and diversified selection of US large-cap companies of any sector that exhibit value characteristics. Portfolio holdings are weighted by market capitalization DFLV was launched on Dec 6, 2022 and is issued by Dimensional.
